message.content:
@startuml
title 蓝牙配对·搜索流程

participant "IotRecorderManager" as IotRecorderManager
participant "DevicesManagerMachine" as DevicesManagerMachine
participant "BlueDiscoveryControl" as BlueDiscoveryControl
participant "BlueBondControl" as BlueBondControl
participant "BleScanControl" as BleScanControl
participant "BluetoothGattConfig" as BluetoothGattConfig

participant "sdk_client" as sdk_client

participant "WifiManagerMachine" as WifiManagerMachine
participant "BluetoothPanConfig" as BluetoothPanConfig
participant "WifiPortalControl" as WifiPortalControl
participant "BluetoothAdapter" as BluetoothAdapter
participant "BluetoothDevice" as BluetoothDevice
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BluetoothGatt
participant "WifiList" as WifiList

== 初始化 ==

note over DevicesManagerMachine : InitState
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : InitState.enter\n<--
DevicesManagerMachine -> sdk_client : registerReceiver

== 搜索设备 ==

[-> IotRecorderManager : startDiscoveryDevice
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : startDiscoveryDevice
note over DevicesManagerMachine : InitState --> DiscoveryState
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : CMD_DISCOVERY_START\n<--
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : DiscoveryState.enter\n<--
BlueDiscoveryControl -> sdk_client : registerReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> sdk_client : new DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : startDiscovery
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter : startDiscovery

BluetoothAdapter --> BlueDiscoveryControl : DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver\n<--
note over BlueDiscoveryControl : BluetoothDevice.ACTION_FOUND
note over DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
DevicesManagerMachine <-- BlueDiscoveryControl : sendMessage

note left of DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND\n返回搜到的蓝牙设备信息：BluetoothDevice

== 绑定设备 ==

[-> IotRecorderManager : BondDevice
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : BondDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueBondControl : CMD_BOND_DEVICE\n<--
BlueBondControl -> BlueBondControl : cancelDiscovery
BlueBondControl -> BluetoothAdapter : cancelDiscovery
BlueBondControl -> BlueBondControl : bondDevice
BlueBondControl -> BluetoothDevice : createBond

BluetoothDevice --> BlueBondControl : BondBroadcastReceiver\n<--
note over DevicesManagerMachine : DiscoveryState --> BondedState
DevicesManagerMachine <-- BlueBondControl : MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
BlueBondControl -> BlueBondControl : BondedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine <-- BlueBondControl

note left of IotRecorderManager : MSG_BOND_SUCCESS\n返回绑定设备信息

== 建立GATT连接 ==

[-> IotRecorderManager : connectGatt
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : connectGatt
note over DevicesManagerMachine : BondedState --> BleScanState
DevicesManagerMachine -> BleScanControl : CMD_CONECT_GATT\n<--
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl : BleScanState.enter\n<--
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl : StartLeScan
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter : getBluetoothLeScanner().startScan

BluetoothAdapter --> BleScanControl : ScanCallback.onScanResult;\n<--
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter : getBluetoothLeScanner().stopScan
DevicesManagerMachine <-- BleScanControl : MSG_LESCAN_RESULT
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : connect
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothDevice : connectGatt
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt : BluetoothGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange\n<--
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt : discoverServices
note right of BluetoothGatt : 发现远程设备提供的服务，以及它们的包含的特征特性和描述符
DevicesManagerMachine <-- BluetoothGatt : MSG_GATT_CONNECTED

BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGattConfig : onServicesDiscovered\n<--
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristicNotification
note right of BluetoothGattConfig : 拿到需要的服务和特征
DevicesManagerMachine <-- BluetoothGattConfig : MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED

[<-- IotRecorderManager : MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
note over DevicesManagerMachine : BleScanState --> GattConnectedState
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl : GattConnectedState.enter\n<--
[<-- IotRecorderManager : MSG_GATT_CONNECTED

DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : new
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothPanConfig : new
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiPortalControl : new
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : start
note over WifiPortalControl : IdleState --> WifiConfigState
WifiPortalControl <-- WifiPortalControl : CMD_START\n<--

== 同步wifi状态 ==

[-> IotRecorderManager : syncWifiState
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : syncWifiState
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_SYNC_WIFI_STATE
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiPortalControl : syncWifiState
WifiPortalControl -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic CMD_GET_WIFI_STATE\n<--
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig : 向服务端操作流数据

note over BluetoothGattConfig : message.what = DevicesManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.arg1 = WifiManagerMachine.WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.arg2 = WifiManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_ON;\nmessage.obj = new String(characteristic.getValue());
BluetoothGattConfig -> WifiManagerMachine : onCharacteristicsChanged    UUID_WIFI_STATE
note right of WifiManagerMachine : WifiConfig.notifiable  setWifiState("ON")

note over DevicesManagerMachine : message.what = msg.arg1;\nmessage.arg1 = msg.arg2;\nmessage.obj = msg.obj;
DevicesManagerMachine <-- WifiManagerMachine : processMessage
IotRecorderManager <-- DevicesManagerMachine : processMessage
[<-- IotRecorderManager : WifiConfigState.processMessage

note over IotRecorderManager : message.what = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.obj = msg.obj;\nmessage.arg1 = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE_ON\nmClientHandler.sendMessage(message);

== 打开wifi开关 ==

[-> IotRecorderManager : setWifiState
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : setWifiState
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiPortalControl : SetWifiState
WifiPortalControl -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic CMD_ENABLE_WIFI\n<--
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig : 向服务端操作流数据

== wifiScan ==

[-> IotRecorderManager : wifiScan
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : wifiScan
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_SCAN_WIFI_LIST
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiPortalControl : setUuidRequestScan
WifiPortalControl -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic CMD_GET_SCAN_WIFILIST\n<--
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig : 向服务端操作流数据
BluetoothGattConfig -> WifiList : UUID_WIFI_ACCESSPOINT <- sendWifiList <- SCAN_RESULTS_AVAILABLE_ACTION
WifiList -> WifiList : updateAccessPoints

@enduml
